recommendations.title: In Her Skin
recommendations.overview: Tale of a 15-year-old Australian girl who went missing.

recommendations.title: Spinning Man
recommendations.overview: Evan Birch is a family man and esteemed professor at a distinguished university. When a female student goes missing, police Detective Malloy has reason to be suspicious when crucial evidence makes Evan the prime suspect in her disappearance.

recommendations.title: Mad Money
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

recommendations.title: Black Souls
recommendations.overview: A former narcotics smuggler, now living peaceably in the Calabrian hills, is drawn back into his family’s drug-trade dynasty by his impetuous teenage son.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.

recommendations.title: A Force of One
recommendations.overview: Karate champion Matt Logan is enlisted by the police to train officers in self-defense after narcotics agents are killed by an assailant using the martial arts.

recommendations.title: A Good Woman Is Hard to Find
recommendations.overview: The recently widowed mother of two, Sarah, is desperate to know who murdered her husband in front of her young son, rendering him mute. Coerced into helping a low-life drug dealer stash narcotics stolen from the local Mr. Big, she's forced into takin

recommendations.title: Nighthawks
recommendations.overview: When one of Europe's most lethal terrorists shows up in New York, an elite undercover cop is assigned to take him down by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: Gunpowder Milkshake
recommendations.overview: To protect an 8-year-old girl, a dangerous assassin reunites with her mother and her lethal associates to take down a ruthless crime syndicate and its army of henchmen.
